property_description: Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 1. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 2. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 3. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
Increases the base armor of an item based on location. +1 to 1h, +3 to 1.5h, +5 to 2h. This armor increase ignores your armor cap.
Increases the base armor of an item based on location. +2 to 1h, +6 to 1.5h, +10 to 2h. This armor increase ignores your armor cap.
Increases the base armor of an item based on location. +3 to 1h, +9 to 1.5h, +15 to 2h. This armor increase ignores your armor cap.
Increases the capacity of the item by 1 for 1h items, 2 for 1.5h items, and 3 for 2h items.
Increases the capacity of the item by 2 for 1h items, 4 for 1.5h items, and 6 for 2h items.
Increases the capacity of the item by 3 for 1h items, 6 for 1.5h items, and 9 for 2h items.
Reduces the number of ingots required to craft an item by 2 for 1h, 3 for 1.5h, 4 for 2h.
Reduces the number of ingots required to craft an item by 4 for 1h, 6 for 1.5h, 8 for 2h.
Reduces the number of ingots required to craft an item by 6 for 1h, 9 for 1.5h, 12 for 2h.
Increases the maximum internal ammo capacity of the weapon up to 4.
Increases the maximum internal ammo capacity of the weapon up to 7.

Increases the maximum internal ammo capacity of the weapon up to 10, OR The weapon may use interchangeable magazines with up to 6 rounds per magazine, and fire once per priming. When created, two magazines are created, which are items of in-play value, considered Glass Misc Items (1h.) Additional magazines may be produced by an artificer for 10 ingots of glass.

Creates a single permanent Trap Kit. When armed, this trap may call "{color} Trap, {effect}!" affecting each target in the area as though they had taken a Radius effect. The effect of the trap is chosen when the trap is armed, and may be one of the following: 10 Heal or Harm. 20 Elemental or Pierce. Fear, Hemhorrage Silence, Slow, or Wither 10. To arm a trap kit, it must be one of the targets of an Artificer's Repair Armor ability, and cannot be moved once it has been armed.
property_limitations: Max size equal to the area within a looped 25 ft rope. - Must form a single unbroken loop when placed. - Must be a distinct color from any other deployed traps or barriers. - Must be clearly visible at time of use, may be lighted.

Blight, Imobilize, or Sleep 10. To arm a trap kit, it must be one of the targets of an Artificer's Repair Armor ability, and cannot be moved once it has been armed.
property_limitations: Max size equal to the area within a looped 25 ft rope. - Must form a single unbroken loop when placed. - Must be a distinct color from any other deployed traps or barriers. - Must be clearly visible at time of use, may be lighted.

property_description: Creates a single permanent Trap Kit. When armed, this trap may call "{color} Trap, {effect}!" affecting each target in the area as though they had taken a Radius effect. The effect of the trap is chosen when the trap is armed, and may be one of the following: 30 Heal or Harm. 60 Elemental or Pierce. Fear, Hemhorrage Silence, Slow, or Wither 30. Blight, Imobilize, or Sleep 20. Insubstantial or Waste 10. Sunder. To arm a trap kit, it must be one of the targets of an Artificer's Repair Armor ability, and cannot be moved once it has been armed.
property_limitations: Max size equal to the area within a looped 25 ft rope. - Must form a single unbroken loop when placed. - Must be a distinct color from any other deployed traps or barriers. - Must be clearly visible at time of use, may be lighted.

property_description: Create a single Basic Pavise that is able to block all damage and conditions (other than sunder and killing blows) it would otherwise receive. Does not prevent radius effects. A "Sunder" or a "Killing Blow" will immediately destroy the Pavise.
property_limitations: Max size- 72"x36" Must be constructed entirely from foam. A Pavise that has been destroyed IP must be immediately removed from the battlefield. Once repaired, it must be fully set up back on the battlefield before it can provide any protection.

property_description: Create a Vault with a magical Structure of 15. Once emplaced, the Vault may not be moved moved for one week. When the Vault's Structure is reduced to 0, it is forced, and it is left open. An Artificer who is touching the vault may spend 60s to reduce the Structure by their Artificer level. Multiple Artificers may do this at the same time. At the start of each day, a character is granted access to the changing combination of the vault. This is to be marked on a note containing that character's name along with the physrep. A large V must be present in blue on the physrep, which must be visible to the door to the building, or appropiately marked on cabin notes. If the vault is not bound to anyone, any Artificer can force the lock instantly.
property_limitations: Cabins may have one vault, Lodges two. Vaults may only be a maximum of 36 inches in any dimension. (3'x3'x3')

property_description: Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 2. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 3. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
Increases the base damage dealt by the weapon by 4. This damage is doubled as normal if wielded in two hands.
Increases the base armor of an item based on location. +2 to 1h, +6 to 1.5h, +10 to 2h. This armor increase ignores your armor cap.
Increases the base armor of an item based on location. +3 to 1h, +9 to 1.5h, +15 to 2h. This armor increase ignores your armor cap.
Increases the base armor of an item based on location. +4 to 1h, +12 to 1.5h, +20 to 2h. This armor increase ignores your armor cap.
Increases the capacity of the item by +2 for 1h items, +4 for 1.5h items, and +6 for 2h items.
Increases the capacity of the item by +3 for 1h items, +6 for 1.5h items, and +9 for 2h items.
Increases the capacity of the item by +4 for 1h items, +8 for 1.5h items, and +12 for 2h items.
Reduces the number of ingots required to craft an item by 4 for 1h, 6 for 1.5h, 8 for 2h.
Reduces the number of ingots required to craft an item by 6 for 1h, 9 for 1.5h, 12 for 2h.
Reduces the number of ingots required to craft an item by 8 for 1h, 12 for 1.5h, 16 for 2h.
Increases the maximum internal ammo capacity of the weapon up to 7.
Increases the maximum internal ammo capacity of the weapon up to 10.

Increases the maximum internal ammo capacity of the weapon up to 12, OR The weapon may use interchangeable magazines with up to 12 rounds per magazine, and fire once per priming. When created, two magazines are created, which are items of in-play value, considered Orichalcum Misc Items (1h.) Additional magazines may be produced by an artificer for 10 ingots of Orichalcum.

Creates a single permanent Trap Kit. When armed, this trap may call "{color} Trap, {effect}!" affecting each target in the area as though they had taken a Radius effect. The effect of the trap is chosen when the trap is armed, and may be one of the following: 10 Heal or Harm. 20 Elemental or Pierce. Fear, Hemhorrage Silence, Slow, or Wither 10. To arm a trap kit, it must be one of the targets of an Artificer's Repair Armor ability, and cannot be moved once it has been armed.

Upcasted: Able to hold 2 charges. Must both be the same ability, following the given restrictions. You must expend two uses of the ability in order to load two charges.
property_limitations: Max size equal to the area within a looped 25 ft rope. - Must form a single unbroken loop when placed. - Must be a distinct color from any other deployed traps or barriers. - Must be clearly visible at time of use, may be lighted.
